metadata.description: The Unified Operations Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text.title: Project Number
text.description: The Project Number of the new FinOps Project

text_1.title: Company GUID
text_1.description: The Company selected for the Quotation / Calculation

text_3.title: Parent Processing Log GUID
text_3.description: The Processing Log that will be used as Parent

number.title: Project Type
number.description: The Project Type that is used to group the Level 1 Calculation Position Nodes

text_4.title: Project Type Name
text_4.description: The Project Type Name (only for debugging purposes)

text_5.description: The Default Shipping Site set on the Quote
text_5.title: Shipping Site Name

text_6.description: The Default Shipping Warehouse set on the Quote
text_6.title: Shipping Warehouse Name

parameters.$filter: _hso_calculationid_value eq @{triggerBody()['text_2']} and hso_projecttype eq @{triggerBody()['number']} and hso_positionelementtype eq 100000006 and hso_level eq 1

Apply_to_each_Level_1_Node_to_fetch_Prod.description: Get all Calculation Positions of Type 'Product' accross all Level 1 Nodes with the Project Type of the Trigger Input

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

parameters.$filter: _hso_calculationid_value eq @{triggerBody()['text_2']} and hso_positionelementtype eq 100000000 and startswith(hso_sortinglinenumber, '@{items('Apply_to_each_Level_1_Node_to_fetch_Products')?['hso_formattedlinenumber_level']}') and hso_isbillofmaterial ne true and hso_positiondetails eq null

List_Calculation_Positions_of_Type_Node_.description: Only list Positions of Type 'Title' (Node) marked as Measurement Product

parameters.$filter: _hso_calculationid_value eq @{triggerBody()['text_2']} and hso_positionelementtype eq 100000006 and hso_measurementproduct eq true and startswith(hso_sortinglinenumber, '@{items('Apply_to_each_Level_1_Node_to_fetch_Products')?['hso_formattedlinenumber_level']}') and hso_positiondetails eq null

_hso_calculationid_value eq @{triggerBody()['text_2']} and hso_positionelementtype eq 100000002 and startswith(hso_sortinglinenumber, '@{items('Apply_to_each_Level_1_Node_to_fetch_Products')?['hso_formattedlinenumber_level']}') and hso_isbillofmaterial ne true and hso_positiondetails eq null

_hso_calculationid_value eq @{triggerBody()['text_2']} and hso_isbillofmaterial eq true and startswith(hso_sortinglinenumber, '@{items('Apply_to_each_Level_1_Node_to_fetch_Products')?['hso_formattedlinenumber_level']}') and hso_positiondetails eq null

Apply_to_each_unique_Product_Number.description: Get a distinct list of Products used in the Calculation Positions fetched in the previous step to aggregate the quantity per product (because an Item Planning is created for all Products used, not for all Calculation Positions fetched)

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch top="50" distinct="true" aggregate="true">
    <entity name="hso_projectproduct">
        <attribute name="hso_lineid" alias="LineID" groupby="true" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" alias="ProjectProductName" groupby="true" />
        <filter type="and">
            <condition attribute="hso_calculationid" operator="eq"
                value="@{triggerBody()?['text_2']}" />
            <condition attribute="hso_isbillofmaterials" operator="eq"
                value="1" />
            <condition attribute="statuscode" operator="ne" value="867520001" />
            <condition attribute="hso_projecttype"
                operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()?['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <link-entity name="hso_calculationdetail" from="hso_billofmaterial_projectproductid"
            to="hso_projectproductid" link-type="inner" alias="CalculationPositions">
            <attribute name="hso_positionquantity" alias="SumOfCalculationPositionPositionQuantity"
                aggregate="sum" />
            <attribute name="hso_quantity" alias="SumOfCalculationPositionQuantity" aggregate="sum" />
            <attribute name="hso_costpriceperunit" alias="SumOfCalculationPositionCostPricePerUnit"
                aggregate="sum" />
            <attribute name="hso_quotedpriceperunit"
                alias="SumOfCalculationPositionQoutedPricePerUnit" aggregate="sum" />
            <attribute name="hso_name" alias="NumberOfCalculationPositions" aggregate="count" />
        </link-entity>
        <link-entity name="uom" from="uomid" to="hso_uomid" alias="Unit">
            <attribute name="msdyn_symbol" alias="UnitSymbol" groupby="true" />
            <attribute name="name" alias="UnitName" groupby="true" />
        </link-entity>
        <link-entity name="product" from="productid" to="hso_productid" alias="Product">
            <attribute name="msdyn_itemnumber" alias="ProductItemNumber" groupby="true" />
            <attribute name="msdyn_productnumber" alias="ProductProductNumber" groupby="true" />
            <attribute name="name" alias="ProductName" groupby="true" />
            <attribute name="productnumber" alias="ProductProductID" groupby="true" />
        </link-entity>
    </entity>
</fetch>

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

definition.description:
Erstellen der Projektartikelplanung für die (Unter-) Projekte welche für eine Kalkulationsversion erstellt wurden. 
Dieser Child Flow wird vom Parent Flow "PA | AUTO | Calculation | Create FinOps Project" aufgerufen.
